title: mutisia alata
intro: Mutisia alata, also known as the winged Mutisia or winged Mutisiopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Andes mountains in South America and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, as well as being used to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
